    }

    private DataSlot<T> GetOrCreateTypedSlot<T>(DataDefinition definition)
    {
        if (_slots.TryGetValue(definition.StableKey, out var existing))
        {
            if (existing is DataSlot<T> typedSlot)
            {
                return typedSlot;
            }

            return ReplaceSlot<T>(definition, existing);
        }

        var slot = new DataSlot<T>(definition);
        _slots[definition.StableKey] = slot;
        return slot;
    }

    private IDataSlot GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(DataDefinition definition, object? value = null)
    {
        if (_slots.TryGetValue(definition.StableKey, out var slot))
        {
            return slot;
        }

        slot = CreateSlot(ResolveBoundarySlotType(definition, value), definition);
        _slots[definition.StableKey] = slot;
        return slot;
    }

    private T GetComputedValue<T>(DataDefinition definition)
    {
        var slot = GetOrCreateTypedSlot<T>(definition);
        if (!_dirtyComputedKeys.Contains(definition.StableKey) && slot.HasValue)
        {
            return slot.GetEffectiveValue();
        }

        if (_computeContext == null)
        {
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data computed resolver 缺少 Data 上下文：{definition.StableKey}");
        }

        var resolver = _catalog.ComputeRegistry.GetRequired(definition.ComputeId);
        var rawValue = resolver.Compute(_computeContext, definition);
        if (!DataValueConverter.TryConvert(rawValue, definition.ValueType, out var computedValue, out var error))
        {
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data computed resolver 返回值类型不匹配：{definition.StableKey} ({definition.ValueType}) {error}");
        }

        slot.SetValueFromBoundary(computedValue);
        _dirtyComputedKeys.Remove(definition.StableKey);
        return slot.GetEffectiveValue();
    }

    private DataSlot<T> ReplaceSlot<T>(DataDefinition definition, IDataSlot existing)
    {
        var replacement = new DataSlot<T>(definition);
        if (existing.HasValue)
        {
            replacement.SetValueFromBoundary(existing.GetStoredValueForDiagnostics());
        }

        var modifiers = existing.GetModifiers();
        for (var i = 0; i < modifiers.Count; i++)
        {
            replacement.AddModifier(modifiers[i]);
        }

        _slots[definition.StableKey] = replacement;
        return replacement;
    }

    private static IDataSlot CreateSlot(Type valueType, DataDefinition definition)
    {
        return (IDataSlot)Activator.CreateInstance(typeof(DataSlot<>).MakeGenericType(valueType), definition)!;
    }

    private static Type ResolveBoundarySlotType(DataDefinition definition, object? value)
    {
        if (definition.ValueType == DataValueType.ObjectRef
            && definition.StoragePolicy == DataStoragePolicy.RuntimeOnly
            && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(definition.RuntimeTypeId))
        {
            return value != null && value is not ResourceRef && !value.GetType().IsValueType
                ? value.GetType()
                : typeof(object);
        }

        if (definition.ValueType == DataValueType.ObjectRef
            && value != null
            && value is not ResourceRef
            && !value.GetType().IsValueType)
        {
            return value.GetType();
        }

        return definition.ValueType switch
        {
            DataValueType.String => typeof(string),
            DataValueType.StringArray => typeof(string[]),
            DataValueType.Int => typeof(int),
            DataValueType.Float => typeof(float),
            DataValueType.Double => typeof(double),
            DataValueType.Bool => typeof(bool),
            DataValueType.Vector2 => typeof(System.Numerics.Vector2),
            DataValueType.Enum => typeof(string),
            DataValueType.ModifierList => typeof(FeatureModifierEntryData[]),
            DataValueType.ObjectRef => typeof(ResourceRef),
            _ => typeof(object)
        };
    }

    private static bool CanApplyModifier(DataDefinition definition, DataWriteSource source)
    {
        if (!IsNumericValueType(definition.ValueType))
        {
            return false;
        }

        return definition.ModifierPolicy switch
        {
            DataModifierPolicy.Numeric => true,
            DataModifierPolicy.DebugOnly => source == DataWriteSource.Debug,
            _ => false
        };
    }

    private static bool IsNumericValueType(DataValueType valueType)
    {
        return valueType is DataValueType.Int or DataValueType.Float or DataValueType.Double;
    }

    private void MarkDependentComputedDirty(string stableKey)
    {
        var dependents = _catalog.GetDependentComputedKeys(stableKey);
        for (var i = 0; i < dependents.Count; i++)
        {
            MarkComputedDirtyRecursive(dependents[i]);
        }
    }

    private void MarkComputedDirtyRecursive(string stableKey)
    {
        _dirtyComputedKeys.Add(stableKey);
        var dependents = _catalog.GetDependentComputedKeys(stableKey);
        for (var i = 0; i < dependents.Count; i++)
        {
            MarkComputedDirtyRecursive(dependents[i]);
        }

    /// <summary>
    /// 清除指定数据键的所有修改器
    /// </summary>
    internal void ClearModifiers(string key)
    {
        if (_runtimeStorage != null)
        {
            _runtimeStorage.ClearModifiers(key);
            return;
        }

        throw CreateUnboundDataException(key);
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// 清除所有修改器
    /// </summary>
    public void ClearAllModifiers()
    {
        if (_runtimeStorage != null)
        {
            _runtimeStorage.ClearAllModifiers();
            return;
        }

        throw CreateUnboundDataException("*");
    }

    // ================= 事件监听 (已移除) =================
    // 请使用 Entity.Events.On(GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged, ...)
    // 数据变更事件负载类型: (string Key, object? OldValue, object? NewValue)


    // ================= 工具方法 =================

    /// <summary>
    /// 清空所有数据
    /// </summary>
    public void Clear()
    {
        if (_runtimeStorage != null)
        {
            _runtimeStorage.Clear();
            return;
        }

        throw CreateUnboundDataException("*");
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// 获取当前所有基础数据的副本。
    /// 仅供 diagnostics/TestSystem dump 使用，返回 Dictionary 会让值类型装箱。
    /// </summary>
    public Dictionary<string, object> GetAll()
    {
        if (_runtimeStorage != null)
        {
            var runtimeValues = _runtimeStorage.GetAllValues();
            var result = new Dictionary<string, object>(runtimeValues.Count);
            foreach (var pair in runtimeValues)
            {
                if (pair.Value != null)
                {
                    result[pair.Key] = pair.Value;
                }
            }

            return result;
        }

        throw CreateUnboundDataException("*");
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// 按数据分类批量重置为默认值。
    /// 当前 DataDefinitionCatalog 不再提供旧 DataMeta 分类重置路径。
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="category">数据分类枚举值（如 DataCategory_Movement.Orbit）</param>
    public void ResetByCategory(Enum category)
    {
        throw CreateUnboundDataException(category.ToString() ?? "*");
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// 按多个数据分类批量重置为默认值
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="categories">要重置的分类列表</param>
    public void ResetByCategories(params Enum[] categories)
    {
        for (int i = 0; i < categories.Length; i++)
        {
            ResetByCategory(categories[i]);
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// 重置数据容器（用于对象池复用）
    /// </summary>
    public void Reset()
    {
        if (_runtimeStorage != null)
        {
            _runtimeStorage.Clear();
            _log.Debug("Data 容器已重置");
            return;
        }

        throw CreateUnboundDataException("*");
    }

    // ================= 私有方法 =================

    /// <summary>
    /// 触发变更通知
    /// </summary>
    private void NotifyChanged(string key, object? oldValue, object? newValue)
    {
        if (_owner != null)
        {
            // 通过 Entity 事件总线广播数据变更
            // 下游监听示例: 
            // entity.Events.On<GameEventType.Data.PropertyChangedEvent>(GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged, evt => ...);
            _owner.Events.Emit(new GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged(key, oldValue, newValue));
        }
    }

    private void OnRuntimeDataChanged(DataChangeRecord change)
    {
        NotifyChanged(change.StableKey, change.OldValue, change.NewValue);
    }

    private static InvalidOperationException CreateUnboundDataException(string key)
    {
        return new InvalidOperationException($"Data 容器未绑定 DataDefinitionCatalog，拒绝访问字段：{key}");
    }

}

  1406	    /// <summary>

  1415	    /// <summary>
  1416	    /// 读取类型安全字段值。
  1417	    /// </summary>
  1418	    /// <typeparam name="T">字段值类型。</typeparam>

  1420	    public T Get<T>(DataKey<T> key)
  1421	    {

  1423	    }
  1424	
  1425	    /// <summary>
  1426	    /// 读取字段值；未写入时返回 descriptor default。
  1427	    /// </summary>
  1428	    /// <typeparam name="T">字段值类型。</typeparam>
  1429	    /// <param name="stableKey">字段 stable key。</param>
  1430	    public T Get<T>(string stableKey)
  1431	    {
  1432	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1433	        if (!DataValueConverter.IsCompatible<T>(definition.ValueType))
  1434	        {
  1435	            throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data.Get 类型不匹配：{stableKey} expected={definition.ValueType}, actual={typeof(T).Name}");
  1436	        }
  1437	
  1438	        return definition.IsComputed
  1439	            ? GetComputedValue<T>(definition)
  1440	            : GetOrCreateTypedSlot<T>(definition).GetEffectiveValue();
  1441	    }
  1442	
  1443	    /// <summary>
  1444	    /// 写入类型安全字段值。
  1445	    /// </summary>
  1446	    /// <typeparam name="T">字段值类型。</typeparam>
  1447	    /// <param name="key">字段 stable key 句柄。</param>
  1448	    /// <param name="value">新值。</param>
  1449	    /// <param name="source">写入来源。</param>
  1450	    public bool Set<T>(DataKey<T> key, T value, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1451	    {
  1452	        return TrySet(key, value, out _, source);
  1453	    }
  1454	
  1455	    /// <summary>
  1456	    /// 写入类型安全字段值，并输出结构化诊断。
  1457	    /// </summary>
  1458	    /// <typeparam name="T">字段值类型。</typeparam>
  1459	    /// <param name="key">字段 stable key 句柄。</param>
  1460	    /// <param name="value">新值。</param>
  1461	    /// <param name="report">写入诊断报告。</param>
  1462	    /// <param name="source">写入来源。</param>
  1463	    public bool TrySet<T>(DataKey<T> key, T value, out DataWriteReport report, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1464	    {
  1465	        report = new DataWriteReport(key.StableKey, source);
  1466	        if (!_catalog.TryGet(key.StableKey, out var definition))
  1467	        {
  1468	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1469	                "unknown_key",
  1470	                key.StableKey,
  1471	                $"未注册 DataDefinition：{key.StableKey}",
  1472	                source,
  1473	                string.Empty,
  1474	                typeof(T).Name,
  1475	                null,
  1476	                value?.ToString()));
  1477	            return false;
  1478	        }
  1479	
  1480	        if (!DataValueConverter.IsCompatible<T>(definition.ValueType))
  1481	        {
  1482	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1483	                "wrong_clr_type",
  1484	                key.StableKey,
  1485	                $"Data value type 不匹配：{key.StableKey} ({definition.ValueType})",
  1486	                source,
  1487	                definition.ValueType.ToString(),
  1488	                typeof(T).Name,
  1489	                null,
  1490	                value?.ToString()));
  1491	            return false;
  1492	        }
  1493	
  1494	        if (!DataValueConverter.TryApplyTypedWritePoliciesWithReport(definition, value, source, out var finalValue, out var error))
  1495	        {
  1496	            if (error != null)
  1497	            {
  1498	                report.AddError(error);
  1499	            }
  1500	
  1501	            return false;
  1502	        }
  1503	
  1504	        var slot = GetOrCreateTypedSlot<T>(definition);
  1505	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1506	        if (!slot.SetValue(finalValue))
  1507	        {
  1508	            return false;
  1509	        }
  1510	
  1511	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(definition.StableKey);
  1512	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(definition.StableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1513	        return true;
  1514	    }
  1515	
  1516	    /// <summary>
  1517	    /// 写入字段值；仅用于 loader/debug/TestSystem 边界，业务热路径应使用 DataKey&lt;T&gt;。
  1518	    /// </summary>
  1519	    /// <param name="stableKey">字段 stable key。</param>
  1520	    /// <param name="value">新值。</param>
  1521	    /// <param name="source">写入来源。</param>
  1522	    public bool SetUntyped(string stableKey, object? value, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1523	    {
  1524	        var definition = _catalog.GetRequired(stableKey);
  1525	        return SetUntyped(definition, value, source);
  1526	    }
  1527	
  1528	    /// <summary>
  1529	    /// 写入字段值并输出结构化诊断；仅用于 loader/debug/TestSystem 边界，值类型进入这里会装箱。

  1532	    /// <param name="value">新值。</param>
  1533	    /// <param name="source">写入来源。</param>
  1534	    /// <param name="report">写入诊断报告。</param>
  1535	    public bool TrySetUntyped(string stableKey, object? value, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report)
  1536	    {
  1537	        report = new DataWriteReport(stableKey, source);
  1538	        if (!_catalog.TryGet(stableKey, out var definition))
  1539	        {
  1540	            report.AddError(new DataWriteError(
  1541	                "unknown_key",
  1542	                stableKey,
  1543	                $"未注册 DataDefinition：{stableKey}",
  1544	                source,
  1545	                string.Empty,
  1546	                value?.GetType().Name,
  1547	                null,
  1548	                value?.ToString()));
  1549	            return false;
  1550	        }
  1551	
  1552	        return TrySetUntyped(definition, value, source, out report);
  1553	    }
  1554	
  1555	    /// <summary>
  1556	    /// 使用已解析 definition 写入字段值；仅用于 loader/debug/TestSystem 边界。
  1557	    /// </summary>
  1558	    /// <param name="definition">字段 descriptor 定义。</param>
  1559	    /// <param name="value">新值。</param>
  1560	    /// <param name="source">写入来源。</param>
  1561	    public bool SetUntyped(DataDefinition definition, object? value, DataWriteSource source = DataWriteSource.Runtime)
  1562	    {

  1564	    }
  1565	
  1566	    /// <summary>
  1567	    /// 使用已解析 definition 写入字段值并输出结构化诊断；值类型进入这里会装箱，不作为业务热路径。
  1568	    /// </summary>
  1569	    /// <param name="definition">字段 descriptor 定义。</param>
  1570	    /// <param name="value">新值。</param>
  1571	    /// <param name="source">写入来源。</param>
  1572	    /// <param name="report">写入诊断报告。</param>
  1573	    public bool TrySetUntyped(DataDefinition definition, object? value, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report)
  1574	    {
  1575	        report = new DataWriteReport(definition.StableKey, source);
  1576	        // 仅用于 loader/debug/TestSystem 边界；业务热路径应使用 DataKey<T>，值类型进入这里会装箱。
  1577	        if (!DataValueConverter.TryApplyWritePoliciesWithReport(definition, value, source, out var finalValue, out var error))
  1578	        {
  1579	            if (error != null)
  1580	            {
  1581	                report.AddError(error);
  1582	            }
  1583	
  1584	            return false;
  1585	        }
  1586	
  1587	        var slot = GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(definition, finalValue);
  1588	        var oldValue = slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics();
  1589	        if (!slot.SetValueFromBoundary(finalValue))
  1590	        {
  1591	            return false;
  1592	        }
  1593	
  1594	        MarkDependentComputedDirty(definition.StableKey);
  1595	        Changed?.Invoke(new DataChangeRecord(definition.StableKey, oldValue, slot.GetEffectiveValueForDiagnostics()));
  1596	        return true;
  1597	    }

  1894	    private IDataSlot GetOrCreateBoundarySlot(DataDefinition definition, object? value = null)
  1895	    {
  1896	        if (_slots.TryGetValue(definition.StableKey, out var slot))
  1897	        {
  1898	            return slot;
  1899	        }
  1900	
  1901	        slot = CreateSlot(ResolveBoundarySlotType(definition, value), definition);
  1902	        _slots[definition.StableKey] = slot;
  1903	        return slot;
  1904	    }
  1905	
  1906	    private T GetComputedValue<T>(DataDefinition definition)
  1907	    {
  1908	        var slot = GetOrCreateTypedSlot<T>(definition);
  1909	        if (!_dirtyComputedKeys.Contains(definition.StableKey) && slot.HasValue)
  1910	        {
  1911	            return slot.GetEffectiveValue();
  1912	        }
  1913	
  1914	        if (_computeContext == null)
  1915	        {
  1916	            throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data computed resolver 缺少 Data 上下文：{definition.StableKey}");
  1917	        }
  1918	
  1919	        var resolver = _catalog.ComputeRegistry.GetRequired(definition.ComputeId);
  1920	        var rawValue = resolver.Compute(_computeContext, definition);
  1921	        if (!DataValueConverter.TryConvert(rawValue, definition.ValueType, out var computedValue, out var error))
  1922	        {
  1923	            throw new InvalidOperationException($"Data computed resolver 返回值类型不匹配：{definition.StableKey} ({definition.ValueType}) {error}");
  1924	        }
  1925	
  1926	        slot.SetValueFromBoundary(computedValue);
  1927	        _dirtyComputedKeys.Remove(definition.StableKey);
  1928	        return slot.GetEffectiveValue();
  1929	    }
  1930	
  1931	    private DataSlot<T> ReplaceSlot<T>(DataDefinition definition, IDataSlot existing)
  1932	    {
  1933	        var replacement = new DataSlot<T>(definition);
  1934	        if (existing.HasValue)
  1935	        {
  1936	            replacement.SetValueFromBoundary(existing.GetStoredValueForDiagnostics());
  1937	        }
  1938	
  1939	        var modifiers = existing.GetModifiers();
  1940	        for (var i = 0; i < modifiers.Count; i++)
  1941	        {
  1942	            replacement.AddModifier(modifiers[i]);
  1943	        }
  1944	
  1945	        _slots[definition.StableKey] = replacement;
  1946	        return replacement;
  1947	    }
  1948	
  1949	    private static IDataSlot CreateSlot(Type valueType, DataDefinition definition)
  1950	    {
  1951	        return (IDataSlot)Activator.CreateInstance(typeof(DataSlot<>).MakeGenericType(valueType), definition)!;
  1952	    }
  1953	
  1954	    private static Type ResolveBoundarySlotType(DataDefinition definition, object? value)
  1955	    {
  1956	        if (definition.ValueType == DataValueType.ObjectRef
  1957	            && definition.StoragePolicy == DataStoragePolicy.RuntimeOnly
  1958	            && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(definition.RuntimeTypeId))
  1959	        {
  1960	            return value != null && value is not ResourceRef && !value.GetType().IsValueType
  1961	                ? value.GetType()
  1962	                : typeof(object);
  1963	        }
  1964	
  1965	        if (definition.ValueType == DataValueType.ObjectRef
  1966	            && value != null
  1967	            && value is not ResourceRef
  1968	            && !value.GetType().IsValueType)
  1969	        {
  1970	            return value.GetType();
  1971	        }
  1972	
  1973	        return definition.ValueType switch
  1974	        {
  1975	            DataValueType.String => typeof(string),
  1976	            DataValueType.StringArray => typeof(string[]),
  1977	            DataValueType.Int => typeof(int),
  1978	            DataValueType.Float => typeof(float),
  1979	            DataValueType.Double => typeof(double),
  1980	            DataValueType.Bool => typeof(bool),
  1981	            DataValueType.Vector2 => typeof(System.Numerics.Vector2),
  1982	            DataValueType.Enum => typeof(string),
  1983	            DataValueType.ModifierList => typeof(FeatureModifierEntryData[]),
  1984	            DataValueType.ObjectRef => typeof(ResourceRef),
  1985	            _ => typeof(object)

   648	    {
   649	        for (int i = 0; i < categories.Length; i++)
   650	        {
   651	            ResetByCategory(categories[i]);
   652	        }
   653	    }
   654

== SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/ECS框架优化/1.拆箱装箱+GC优化/问题/00-总览.md ==
9:# ECS框架装箱拆箱与GC优化 - 总览
11:## 问题全景
13:SlimeAI ECS框架存在 **6大类、26个** 装箱拆箱/GC分配热点。根源是DataSlot用object?存储值类型，导致整个数据读写链路每帧产生上千次装箱。
15:## 严重度排名
17:| 级别 | 问题 | 每帧影响 | 预估分配/帧 |
19:| 🔴 CRITICAL | DataSlot object? 结构化装箱 | 每次Get/Set | 2000+次装箱+拆箱 |
20:| 🔴 CRITICAL | EventBus.EmitDynamic 反射+装箱 | 每次动态事件 | 反射+数组+装箱 |
21:| 🟠 HIGH | new Random() 热路径分配 | 每次TargetQuery | 1次堆分配 |
23:| 🟠 HIGH | LINQ .Where().ToList() | 每次GetManualAbilities | List+迭代器 |
24:| 🟠 HIGH | DataConvert 返回object | 每次数据写入 | 每次写入装箱 |
25:| 🟡 MEDIUM | PropertyChanged事件 object? | 每次数据变更 | 2次装箱 |
26:| 🟡 MEDIUM | EventContext._result object? | 每次能力触发 | 1次装箱 |
27:| 🟡 MEDIUM | foreach Dictionary.Values | 每帧系统遍历 | Mono下可能分配 |
30:| 🟢 LOW | DataModifier.Source object? | 每次创建Modifier | 可能装箱 |
32:## 根因分析
34:### 核心架构问题：DataSlot用object?存储
37:Data.Set<float>("hp", 100f)          → (float)100f 装箱为 object
39:DataSlot.SetValue(object?)           → 存储到 _value: object?
41:Data.Get<float>("hp")                → 从 object? 拆箱回 float
43:DataSlot.ApplyModifiers(object?)     → 拆箱→计算→重新装箱
45:DataSlot.ConvertNumericToDefinitionType() → 显式 (object)(float)value
48:每帧每个实体的HP、速度、攻击力等数值读写都走这条路径。
50:### 数据流装箱链路图
54:  Set<T>(key, T value) → TrySetUntyped(key, object?) → DataSlot.SetValue(object?)
55:  T value 装箱为 object
59:  object? 拆箱回 T
62:  ApplyModifiers(object? baseValue) → TryGetNumeric(object, out double)
63:  → 计算 → ConvertNumericToDefinitionType(double) → (object)(float)result
66:  Emit(new PropertyChanged(key, object? old, object? new)) → 两次装箱
69:## 优化路线图
71:### Phase 1: DataSlot类型分区（预计消除80%装箱）
72:- 将 DataSlot.Value: object? 替换为类型分区存储
73:- Dictionary<string, float> _floatSlots
74:- Dictionary<string, int> _intSlots
75:- Dictionary<string, bool> _boolSlots
76:- Dictionary<string, object?> _complexSlots（Vector2等复杂类型）
79:### Phase 2: EventBus动态路径优化（预计消除15%分配）
82:- 详见：[02-EventBus装箱与反射.md](02-EventBus装箱与反射.md)
84:### Phase 3: ObjectPoolManager去反射（预计消除3%分配）
85:- 用接口多态替代反射调用
86:- 详见：[03-ObjectPoolManager反射调用.md](03-ObjectPoolManager反射调用.md)
88:### Phase 4: 热路径分配优化（预计消除2%分配）
89:- Random.Shared 替代 new Random()
91:- LINQ替换为手动循环
92:- 详见：[04-LINQ热路径分配.md](04-LINQ热路径分配.md), [05-List与Dictionary分配.md](05-List与Dictionary分配.md)
94:## 验收标准
96:| 指标 | 当前预估 | 目标 |
98:| 每帧堆分配 | >2KB | <100B |

== SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/ECS框架优化/1.拆箱装箱+GC优化/问题/01-DataSlot结构化装箱.md ==
6:description: DataSlot用object?存储值类型导致的系统性装箱拆箱问题分析与解决方案
9:# DataSlot结构化装箱问题
11:> 严重度：🔴 CRITICAL
13:> 预估影响：每帧2000+次装箱+2000+次拆箱 = 32KB/帧 = 1.92MB/秒
15:## 问题描述
17:DataSlot是Data系统的底层存储单元。它用 `object?` 存储所有值，导致每次读写值类型（float, int, bool, Vector2等）都要装箱和拆箱。
19:## 涉及代码（10处）
21:### 1. DataSlot.Value 存储为 object?
25:public object? Value { get; private set; }
27:**问题：** 所有float、int、bool、Vector2值写入DataSlot时都被装箱为object引用。
29:### 2. DataSlot.SetValue 接受 object?
33:public bool SetValue(object? value)
35:**问题：** 类型化的Set<T>方法将T值装箱为object?后传入。
37:### 3. DataSlot.GetEffectiveValue 返回 object?
41:public object? GetEffectiveValue()
45:### 4. DataSlot.ConvertNumericToDefinitionType 显式装箱
49:private object ConvertNumericToDefinitionType(double value)
53:        DataValueType.Int => (object)(int)value,
54:        DataValueType.Float => (object)(float)value,
55:        DataValueType.Double => (object)value,
56:        _ => (object)value
62:### 5. DataSlot.ApplyModifiers 拆箱→计算→重新装箱
66:private object? ApplyModifiers(object? baseValue)
70:### 6. DataSlot.TryGetNumeric 拆箱
74:private static bool TryGetNumeric(object value, out double numericValue)
78:### 7. DataRuntimeStorage.Get<T> 拆箱路径
84:    var value = GetOrCreateSlot(definition).GetEffectiveValue(); // object?
90:### 8. DataRuntimeStorage.SetUntyped 装箱路径
94:public bool SetUntyped(string stableKey, object? value, DataWriteSource source)
96:**问题：** Set<T>将值传给TrySetUntyped(object?)，装箱。
98:### 9. DataValueConverter.ConvertXxx 返回 object
102:private static object ConvertInt(object rawValue) { return rawValue switch { int v => v, ... }; }
103:private static object ConvertFloat(object rawValue) { return rawValue switch { float v => v, ... }; }
104:private static object ConvertBool(object rawValue) { ... }
105:private static object ConvertVector2(object rawValue) { ... }
107:**问题：** 返回object导致值类型装箱。每次数据写入操作都调用。
109:### 10. TryReadVector2 使用反射
113:private static bool TryReadVector2(object rawValue, out float x, out float y)
116:    var xMember = type.GetProperty("X") ?? (object?)type.GetField("X");
117:    object? rawX = xMember switch
125:**问题：** 使用反射读取Godot.Vector2字段。每次Vector2有修改器应用时触发。
127:## 调用频率估算
129:| 调用路径 | 每实体每帧 | 装箱次数 |
140:**每实体每帧：** ~10-15次装箱+拆箱
144:## 解决方案
146:### 方案A：类型分区存储（推荐）
149:// 当前（每帧2000+次装箱拆箱）
150:private object? _value;
155:    private readonly Dictionary<string, float> _floatSlots = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
156:    private readonly Dictionary<string, int> _intSlots = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
157:    private readonly Dictionary<string, bool> _boolSlots = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
158:    private readonly Dictionary<string, object?> _complexSlots = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
165:            DataValueType.Float => (T)(object)_floatSlots.GetValueOrDefault(stableKey),
166:            DataValueType.Int => (T)(object)_intSlots.GetValueOrDefault(stableKey),
167:            DataValueType.Bool => (T)(object)_boolSlots.GetValueOrDefault(stableKey),
174:**注意：** 方案A的Get<T>仍有(T)(object)转换。要完全零装箱需要方案B。
176:### 方案B：泛型DataSlot<T>（完全零装箱）
192:### 方案C：混合方案（推荐平衡点）
195:// 用union type替代object?
208:## 验证方法
211:# 1. 使用dotnet-counters监控GC
214:# 2. 使用dotnet-trace捕获分配热点
217:# 3. 对比优化前后 Gen0 GC次数/秒

== SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/ECS框架优化/1.拆箱装箱+GC优化/问题/02-EventBus装箱与反射.md ==
2:title: EventBus装箱与反射问题
6:description: EventBus.EmitDynamic和Action<object>路径的装箱与反射开销分析
9:# EventBus装箱与反射问题
11:> 严重度：🔴 CRITICAL（EmitDynamic）/ 🟡 MEDIUM（Action<object>路径）
14:## 问题描述
17:1. `EmitDynamic(object eventData)` — 反射+装箱+数组分配
18:2. `Action<object>` 订阅者路径 — struct事件被装箱
20:## 涉及代码（4处）
22:### 1. EmitDynamic — 完整反射链 + 装箱
26:public void EmitDynamic(object eventData)
38:private void TriggerDynamicInner<T>(object data) where T : struct
47:- `new[] { eventData }` — 分配object[]数组
48:- `eventData`如果是struct — 装箱为object
53:### 2. Action<object> 订阅路径 — struct装箱
57:else if (sub.Handler is Action<object> objectHandler)
59:    objectHandler(data); // struct data 装箱为 object
63:### 3. Subscription 是 class — 每次订阅堆分配
71:### 4. Trigger 方法中的类型检查分支
80:else if (sub.Handler is Action<object> objectHandler)
82:    objectHandler(data); // 装箱！
86:## 解决方案
88:### 方案A：缓存泛型方法（最小改动）
91:private static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<Type, MethodInfo> _emitDynamicCache = new();
93:public void EmitDynamic(object eventData)
104:### 方案B：类型注册表（推荐，零反射）
107:private readonly Dictionary<Type, Action<object>> _dynamicEmitters = new();
114:public void EmitDynamic(object eventData)
122:### 方案C：完全消除EmitDynamic（最佳）
126:EventBus.Emit(new Unit.Damaged(...)); // 零装箱零反射

== SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/ECS框架优化/1.拆箱装箱+GC优化/问题/03-ObjectPoolManager反射调用.md ==
2:title: ObjectPoolManager反射调用问题
5:tags: [ecs, reflection, objectpool, medium]
6:description: ObjectPoolManager用反射调用Release方法导致的GC分配问题
9:# ObjectPoolManager反射调用问题
11:> 严重度：🟡 MEDIUM
14:## 涉及代码（4处）
16:### 1. _pools 存储为 Dictionary<string, object>
20:private static readonly Dictionary<string, object> _pools = [];
22:**问题：** 所有ObjectPool<T>实例存储为object，类型信息丢失。
24:### 2. ReturnToPool 用反射调用 Release
28:private static void ReturnToPool(object instance, string poolName)
32:    releaseMethod.Invoke(poolObj, new[] { instance }); // 反射 + object[] 分配
36:**每次调用的GC开销：** 2-3次堆分配（GetType + GetMethod + object[]）
38:### 3. GetAllStats / CleanupAll / DestroyAll 使用反射
45:**问题：** 生命周期方法，低频但仍有反射开销。
47:## 解决方案
49:### 接口多态替代反射（推荐）
55:    void ReleaseUntyped(object instance);
64:    public void ReleaseUntyped(object instance) => Release((T)instance);
68:private static readonly Dictionary<string, IPool> _pools = new();
70:private static void ReturnToPool(object instance, string poolName)
73:        pool.ReleaseUntyped(instance); // 虚方法调用，零反射

16:### 1. SystemManager — foreach Dictionary.Values（每帧）
22:**问题：** SystemManager每帧遍历所有系统。在Mono下 `.Values` 可能分配ValueCollection。

45:### 7. ComponentRegistrar — 双重 ToArray()

== SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/ECS框架优化/1.拆箱装箱+GC优化/问题/07-字符串插值即时求值.md ==
2:title: 字符串插值即时求值问题
6:description: 日志中的字符串插值即使日志关闭也会分配字符串
9:# 字符串插值即时求值问题
11:> 严重度：🟡 MEDIUM
14:## 问题描述
16:C#的字符串插值 `$"..."` 在调用时立即求值，即使日志级别被禁用。每次插值都分配一个新的string对象，值类型参数被装箱为params object[]。
18:## SlimeAI中的模式
21:// 每次调用都分配字符串，即使Info级别被禁用
27:**估算：** 假设每帧20次日志调用，每次平均15字符 + 2个装箱参数 ≈ 80字节/帧
29:## 解决方案
31:### 条件日志
38:### LoggerMessage源生成（零分配）

== SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/ECS框架优化/1.拆箱装箱+GC优化/问题/08-DataModifier与EventContext装箱.md ==
2:title: DataModifier与EventContext装箱问题
6:description: 次要装箱源：DataModifier.Source、EventContext._result、PropertyChanged事件
9:# DataModifier与EventContext装箱问题
11:> 严重度：🟡 MEDIUM
14:## 涉及代码（5处）
16:### 1. PropertyChanged事件 — OldValue/NewValue 为 object?
20:public readonly record struct PropertyChanged(string Key, object? OldValue, object? NewValue);
23:**频率：** 战斗中HP每帧变更 → 每帧2次装箱
25:### 2. DataChangeRecord — OldValue/NewValue 为 object?
29:public sealed record DataChangeRecord(string StableKey, object? OldValue, object? NewValue);
32:### 3. EventContext._result — 存储为 object?
34:**文件：** `ECS/Runtime/Event/EventContext.cs` 第68行
36:private object? _result;
42:### 4. IFeatureHandler.OnExecute 返回 object?
46:public object? OnExecute(FeatureContext featureContext)
49:### 5. DataModifier.Source — 存储为 object?
53:public object? Source { get; init; }
56:## 解决方案
58:### PropertyChanged — 泛型事件
62:public readonly record struct PropertyChanged(string Key, object? OldValue, object? NewValue);
69:### EventContext._result — 泛型result holder

== SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/ECS框架优化/1.拆箱装箱+GC优化/问题/09-实体生命周期分配.md ==
6:description: 实体Spawn/Destroy过程中的集合分配和LINQ使用问题
9:# 实体生命周期分配问题
11:> 严重度：🟢 LOW（生命周期方法，非每帧）
14:## 涉及代码（7处）
16:### 1. ComponentRegistrar — .Distinct().ToArray() 注册时
23:### 2. HandleLifecycleChildrenOnDestroy — .ToArray()
30:### 3. EntityManager_Component — new List\<Node\>()
37:### 4. DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead — Activator.CreateInstance
45:### 5. Relationship.Data — Dictionary\<string, object\>
49:public Dictionary<string, object> Data { get; set; } = new();
52:### 6. RuntimeDataSnapshot.Manifest — Dictionary\<string, object?\>
56:public Dictionary<string, object?> Manifest { get; init; } = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
59:### 7. DataRuntimeStorage._computedCache — Dictionary\<string, object?\>
63:private readonly Dictionary<string, object?> _computedCache = new(StringComparer.Ordinal);
66:## 严重度说明
68:以上问题都是生命周期方法（Spawn/Destroy/Load），非每帧调用。优化优先级低于DataSlot和EventBus问题。但如果战斗中大量实体频繁Spawn/Destroy（如子弹、特效），这些分配会累积。
70:## 解决方案
72:### 生命周期方法 — 对象池 + 预分配
81:// Relationship.Data — 类型分区（与DataSlot方案一致）
82:public Dictionary<string, float> FloatData { get; set; } = new();
83:public Dictionary<string, int> IntData { get; set; } = new();
84:public Dictionary<string, string> StringData { get; set; } = new();

```

     1	using Godot;
     2	using System;
     3	using System.Collections.Generic;
     4	using System.Linq;
     5	
     6	/// <summary>
     7	/// 实体目标选择器。
     8	/// 负责从已注册实体中筛出满足几何范围、阵营/类型过滤、排序与数量限制的目标集合。
     9	///
    10	/// 执行顺序：
    11	/// 1) 几何候选收集（或 Chain 路径生成）；
    12	/// 2) 阵营与类型过滤；
    13	/// 3) 排序（Chain 保留路径顺序不排序）；
    14	/// 4) MaxTargets 截断。
    15	/// </summary>
    16	public static class EntityTargetSelector
    17	{
    18	    private static readonly Log _log = new(nameof(EntityTargetSelector));
    19	
    20	    /// <summary>
    21	    /// 查询并返回符合条件的实体列表。
    22	    /// 支持常规几何范围扫描（Circle/Ring/Box/Line/Cone/Global）。
    23	    /// </summary>
    24	    /// <param name="query">查询配置参数</param>
    25	    /// <returns>符合条件的 List&lt;IEntity&gt;</returns>
    26	    public static List<IEntity> Query(TargetSelectorQuery query)
    27	    {
    28	        var candidates = new List<IEntity>();
    29	
    30	        if (query.Geometry == GeometryType.Single)
    31	        {
    32	            // Single 模式通常需要外部预选目标
    33	            candidates = new List<IEntity>();
    34	        }
    35	        else
    36	        {
    37	            // 遍历全量 Node2D 实体并执行几何命中判定。
    38	            foreach (var entity in GetAllNode2DEntities())
    39	            {
    40	                if (entity is Node2D node2D)
    41	                {
    42	                    if (GeometryCalculator.IsPointInGeometry(node2D.GlobalPosition, query))
    43	                    {
    44	                        candidates.Add(entity);
    45	                    }
    46	                }
    47	            }
    48	
    49	            candidates = FilterTargets(candidates, query.CenterEntity, query.TeamFilter, query.TypeFilter);
    50	        }
    51	
    52	        if (candidates.Count > 1)
    53	        {
    54	            SortTargets(candidates, query.Origin, query.Sorting);
    55	        }
    56	
    57	        if (query.MaxTargets > 0 && candidates.Count > query.MaxTargets)
    58	        {
    59	            candidates = candidates.GetRange(0, query.MaxTargets);
    60	        }
    61	
    62	        return candidates;
    63	    }
    64	
    65	    /// <summary>
    66	    /// 对候选目标执行通用过滤：阵营、类型、生命周期状态。
    67	    /// 会过滤 Dead / Reviving 实体，避免选中无效目标。
    68	    /// </summary>
    69	    private static List<IEntity> FilterTargets(List<IEntity> targets,
    70	        IEntity? centerEntity,
    71	        TeamFilter teamFilter,
    72	        EntityType typeFilter)
    73	    {
    74	        var filtered = new List<IEntity>();
    75	        foreach (var target in targets)
    76	        {
    77	            if (!PassTeamFilter(target, centerEntity, teamFilter)) continue;
    78	            if (!PassTypeFilter(target, typeFilter)) continue;
    79	            if (target.Data.Has(GeneratedDataKey.LifecycleState))
    80	            {
    81	                var state = target.Data.Get<LifecycleState>(GeneratedDataKey.LifecycleState);
    82	                if (state == LifecycleState.Dead || state == LifecycleState.Reviving) continue;
    83	            }
    84	
    85	            filtered.Add(target);
    86	        }
    87	
    88	        return filtered;
    89	    }
    90	
    91	    /// <summary>
    92	    /// 阵营过滤判定。
    93	    /// 若 filter 为 None 或 All 则直接放行；
    94	    /// 若目标为自身则仅由 Self 标志决定；
    95	    /// 其余按 center 与 target 阵营关系判定 Friendly / Enemy / Neutral。
    96	    /// </summary>
    97	    private static bool PassTeamFilter(IEntity target, IEntity? center, TeamFilter filter)
    98	    {
    99	        if (filter == TeamFilter.None || filter == TeamFilter.All) return true;
   100	        bool isSelf = IsSameEntity(target, center);
   101	        if (isSelf) return filter.HasFlag(TeamFilter.Self);
   102	        Team targetTeam = target.Data.Get<Team>(GeneratedDataKey.Team);
   103	        if (targetTeam == Team.Neutral) return filter.HasFlag(TeamFilter.Neutral);
   104	        if (center == null) return false;
   105	        Team centerTeam = center.Data.Get<Team>(GeneratedDataKey.Team);
   106	        bool isSameTeam = centerTeam == targetTeam;
   107	        if (isSameTeam) return filter.HasFlag(TeamFilter.Friendly);
   108	        return filter.HasFlag(TeamFilter.Enemy);
   109	    }
   110	
   111	    /// <summary>
   112	    /// 类型过滤判定。
   113	    /// 当 filter 为 EntityType.None 时视为不过滤；否则需要目标存在 EntityType 且命中位掩码。
   114	    /// </summary>
   115	    private static bool PassTypeFilter(IEntity target, EntityType filter)
   116	    {
   117	        if (filter == EntityType.None) return true;
   118	        if (!target.Data.Has(GeneratedDataKey.EntityType)) return false;
   119	        EntityType entityType = target.Data.Get<EntityType>(GeneratedDataKey.EntityType);
   120	        return filter.HasFlag(entityType);
   121	    }
   122	
   123	    /// <summary>
   124	    /// 对目标集合执行排序。
   125	    /// 排序仅改变顺序，不改变元素集合；随机排序使用 Fisher-Yates 洗牌。
   126	    /// </summary>
   127	    private static void SortTargets(List<IEntity> targets, Vector2 origin, TargetSorting sorting)
   128	    {
   129	        switch (sorting)
   130	        {
   131	            case TargetSorting.None: break;
   132	            case TargetSorting.Nearest:
   133	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   134	                    GetEntityPosition(a).DistanceTo(origin).CompareTo(GetEntityPosition(b).DistanceTo(origin)));
   135	                break;
   136	            case TargetSorting.Farthest:
   137	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   138	                    GetEntityPosition(b).DistanceTo(origin).CompareTo(GetEntityPosition(a).DistanceTo(origin)));
   139	                break;
   140	            case TargetSorting.LowestHealth:
   141	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   142	                    a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.CurrentHp).CompareTo(b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.CurrentHp)));
   143	                break;
   144	            case TargetSorting.HighestHealth:
   145	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   146	                    b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.CurrentHp).CompareTo(a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.CurrentHp)));
   147	                break;
   148	            case TargetSorting.HighestHealthPercent:
   149	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   150	                    b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.HpPercent).CompareTo(a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.HpPercent)));
   151	                break;
   152	            case TargetSorting.LowestHealthPercent:
   153	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   154	                    a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.HpPercent).CompareTo(b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.HpPercent)));
   155	                break;
   156	            case TargetSorting.Random:
   157	                Random rng = new Random();
   158	                for (int i = targets.Count - 1; i > 0; i--)
   159	                {
   160	                    int j = rng.Next(i + 1);
   161	                    (targets[i], targets[j]) = (targets[j], targets[i]);
   162	                }
   163	
   164	                break;
   165	            case TargetSorting.HighestThreat:
   166	                targets.Sort((a, b) =>
   167	                    (b.Data.Has(GeneratedDataKey.Threat) ? b.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.Threat) : 0).CompareTo(
   168	                        a.Data.Has(GeneratedDataKey.Threat) ? a.Data.Get<float>(GeneratedDataKey.Threat) : 0));
   169	                break;
   170	        }
   171	    }
   172	
   173	    /// <summary>
   174	    /// 判断两个 IEntity 是否引用同一实体。
   175	    /// 优先使用引用比较；若均为 Node，则进一步按 Godot 节点实例比较。
   176	    /// </summary>
   177	    private static bool IsSameEntity(IEntity? a, IEntity? b)
   178	    {
   179	        if (a == b) return true;
   180	        if (a is Node n1 && b is Node n2) return n1 == n2;
   181	        return false;
   182	    }
   183	
   184	    /// <summary>
   185	    /// 获取当前生命周期管理器中的全部 Node2D 且实现 IEntity 的节点。
   186	    /// </summary>
   187	    private static IEnumerable<IEntity> GetAllNode2DEntities()
   188	    {
   189	        return NodeLifecycleManager.GetNodesByInterface<Node2D>().OfType<IEntity>();
   190	    }
   191	
   192	    /// <summary>
   193	    /// 读取实体世界坐标。
   194	    /// 非 Node2D 实体返回 Vector2.Zero（理论上不应在 TargetSelector 中出现）。
   195	    /// </summary>
   196	    private static Vector2 GetEntityPosition(IEntity entity)
   197	    {
   198	        if (entity is Node2D node2D) return node2D.GlobalPosition;
   199	        return Vector2.Zero;
   200	    }
   201	}
     1	using Godot;
     2	using System;
     3	using System.Collections.Generic;

     6	/// <summary>
     7	/// Ability owner 清单服务。
     8	/// <para>负责 ability -> owner 单引用、owner -> ability list 查询和 cleanup，不再使用 EntityRelationshipManager。</para>
     9	/// </summary>
    10	public sealed class AbilityInventoryService
    11	{
    12	    private static readonly Log _log = new(nameof(AbilityInventoryService), LogLevel.Warning);
    13	
    14	    private readonly Func<EntityId, Node?> _resolveNode;
    15	    private readonly Func<OwnedReferenceDescriptor, bool> _registerReference;
    16	    private readonly Func<IEntity, IEntity, OwnedReferenceDescriptor, bool> _addReference;
    17	    private readonly Func<IEntity, OwnedReferenceDescriptor, bool> _removeReference;
    18	
    19	    private static AbilityInventoryService? _runtime;
    20	
    21	    /// <summary>Ability owner Data projection descriptor。</summary>
    22	    public static readonly OwnedReferenceDescriptor OwnerDescriptor = new(
    23	        GeneratedDataKey.AbilityOwnerEntityId,
    24	        GeneratedDataKey.OwnedAbilityIds
    25	    );
    26	
    27	    public AbilityInventoryService(Func<EntityId, Node?> resolveNode, OwnedReferenceRegistry ownedReferenceRegistry)
    28	        : this(
    29	            resolveNode,
    30	            ownedReferenceRegistry.Register,
    31	            ownedReferenceRegistry.AddReference,
    32	            ownedReferenceRegistry.RemoveReference)
    33	    {
    34	    }
    35	
    36	    public AbilityInventoryService(
    37	        Func<EntityId, Node?> resolveNode,
    38	        Func<OwnedReferenceDescriptor, bool> registerReference,
    39	        Func<IEntity, IEntity, OwnedReferenceDescriptor, bool> addReference,
    40	        Func<IEntity, OwnedReferenceDescriptor, bool> removeReference)
    41	    {
    42	        _resolveNode = resolveNode ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(resolveNode));
    43	        _registerReference = registerReference ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(registerReference));
    44	        _addReference = addReference ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(addReference));
    45	        _removeReference = removeReference ?? throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(removeReference));
    46	        _registerReference(OwnerDescriptor);
    47	    }
    48	
    49	    /// <summary>
    50	    /// 默认运行时服务，使用 EntityManager 的 registry 与 owned-reference cleanup hook。
    51	    /// </summary>
    52	    public static AbilityInventoryService Runtime =>
    53	        _runtime ??= new AbilityInventoryService(
    54	            EntityManager.ResolveEntityNode,
    55	            EntityManager.RegisterOwnedReference,
    56	            EntityManager.AddOwnedReference,
    57	            EntityManager.RemoveOwnedReference
    58	        );
    59	
    60	    /// <summary>
    61	    /// 为 owner 添加 snapshot ability。
    62	    /// </summary>
    63	    public AbilityEntity? AddAbility(IEntity owner, AbilityDefinitionView config)
    64	    {
    65	        return AddAbilityCore(
    66	            owner,
    67	            config,
    68	            config.Name,
    69	            config.FeatureHandlerId,
    70	            validateAbilityHandler: true,
    71	            runtimeDataRecordTable: config.Table,
    72	            runtimeDataRecordId: config.RecordId
    73	        );
    74	    }
    75	
    76	    /// <summary>
    77	    /// 为 owner 添加运行时构造的通用 Feature record。
    78	    /// </summary>
    79	    public AbilityEntity? AddRuntimeFeature(IEntity owner, RuntimeDataRecordDto record)
    80	    {
    81	        var abilityName = ReadRecordString(record, GeneratedDataKey.Name.StableKey);
    82	        var handlerId = ReadRecordString(record, GeneratedDataKey.FeatureHandlerId.StableKey);
    83	        return AddAbilityCore(
    84	            owner,
    85	            record,
    86	            abilityName,
    87	            handlerId,
    88	            validateAbilityHandler: false,
    89	            runtimeDataRecord: record
    90	        );
    91	    }
    92	
    93	    /// <summary>
    94	    /// 建立 owner -> ability 引用。
    95	    /// </summary>
    96	    public bool Attach(IEntity? owner, AbilityEntity? ability)
    97	    {
    98	        if (owner == null || ability == null)
    99	            return false;
   100	
   101	        return _addReference(owner, ability, OwnerDescriptor);
   102	    }
   103	
   104	    public bool RemoveAbility(IEntity owner, string abilityName)
   105	    {
   106	        if (owner == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(abilityName))
   107	            return false;
   108	
   109	        var ability = GetAbilityByName(owner, abilityName);
   110	        if (ability == null)
   111	        {
   112	            _log.Warn($"单位不拥有技能 {abilityName}");
   113	            return false;
   114	        }
   115	
   116	        return RemoveAbility(owner, ability);
   117	    }
   118	
   119	    public bool RemoveAbility(IEntity owner, AbilityEntity ability)
   120	    {
   121	        if (owner == null || ability == null)
   122	            return false;
   123	
   124	        var abilityId = ability.Data.Get(GeneratedDataKey.Id);
   125	        var abilityName = ability.Data.Get(GeneratedDataKey.Name);
   126	
   127	        // Feature 生命周期钩子必须在 Destroy 前调用，使 handler 仍能访问 feature.Data。
   128	        FeatureSystem.OnFeatureRemoved(ability, owner);
   129	        Detach(ability);
   130	
   131	        EntityManager.Destroy(ability);
   132	        owner.Events.Emit(new GameEventType.Ability.Removed(abilityName, abilityId, owner));
   133	
   134	        _log.Info($"移除技能实例: {abilityName} ({abilityId})");
   135	        return true;
   136	    }
   137	
   138	    /// <summary>
   139	    /// 移除 ability 当前 owner 引用。
   140	    /// </summary>
   141	    public bool Detach(AbilityEntity? ability)
   142	    {
   143	        if (ability == null)
   144	            return false;
   145	
   146	        return _removeReference(ability, OwnerDescriptor);
   147	    }
   148	
   149	    /// <summary>
   150	    /// 获取 ability owner。

   158	        if (ownerId.IsEmpty)
   159	            return null;
   160	
   161	        return _resolveNode(ownerId) as IEntity;
   162	    }

   167	    public List<AbilityEntity> GetAbilities(IEntity? owner)

   193	    /// <summary>
   194	    /// 获取 owner 拥有的手动主动技能。
   195	    /// </summary>
   196	    public List<AbilityEntity> GetManualAbilities(IEntity? owner)
   197	    {
   198	        return GetAbilities(owner)
   199	            .Where(ability =>
   200	            {
   201	                var mode = ability.Data.Get<AbilityTriggerMode>(GeneratedDataKey.AbilityTriggerMode);
   202	                var type = ability.Data.Get<AbilityType>(GeneratedDataKey.AbilityType);
   203	                return type != AbilityType.Passive && mode.HasFlag(AbilityTriggerMode.Manual);
   204	            })
   205	            .ToList();
   206	    }

   209	    {

   212

   226	    private AbilityEntity? AddAbilityCore(

   241

   244	            _log.Error("无法添加技能：配置缺少 Name 属性");
   245	            return null;
   246	        }
   247	
   248	        var existingAbility = GetAbilityByName(owner, abilityName);
   249	        if (existingAbility != null)
   250	        {
   251	            _log.Warn($"单位已拥有技能 {abilityName}");
   252	            return existingAbility;
   253	        }
   254	
   255	        if (validateAbilityHandler && !ValidateAbilityHandlerConfig(handlerIdFromConfig, abilityName))
   256	            return null;
   257	
   258	        var ability = EntityManager.Spawn<AbilityEntity>(new EntitySpawnConfig
   259	        {
   260	            Config = config,

   262	            RuntimeDataRecordTable = runtimeDataRecordTable,

   264	            UsingObjectPool = true,
   265	            PoolName = ObjectPoolNames.AbilityPool,
   266	            LifecycleParentId = ResolveEntityId(owner),
   267	            ParentDestroyPolicy = ParentDestroyPolicy.DestroyRecursively
   268	        });
   269	
   270	        if (ability == null)
   271	        {
   272	            _log.Error($"创建技能实体失败: {abilityName}");

   280	            EntityManager.Destroy(ability);

     1	/// <summary>
     2	/// 事件上下文基类
     3	/// 
     4	/// Context Object Pattern 用于事件系统中的"请求-响应"模式：
     5	/// - 发布者创建 Context 对象并通过事件传递
     6	/// - 订阅者修改 Context（填写结果、设置阻止等）
     7	/// - 发布者读取 Context 获取处理结果
     8	/// 
     9	/// 详细设计文档：DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/Event/Event系统说明.md
    10	/// </summary>
    11	public class EventContext
    12	{
    13	    // ================= 流程控制 =================
    14	
    15	    /// <summary>
    16	    /// 是否已处理（任一订阅者标记后保持）
    17	    /// </summary>
    18	    public bool IsHandled { get; protected set; }
    19	
    20	    /// <summary>
    21	    /// 是否阻止后续订阅者执行
    22	    /// 类似 DOM Event 的 stopPropagation()
    23	    /// </summary>
    24	    public bool IsPropagationStopped { get; private set; }
    25	
    26	    /// <summary>
    27	    /// 阻止事件继续传播给后续订阅者
    28	    /// </summary>
    29	    public void StopPropagation() => IsPropagationStopped = true;
    30	
    31	    // ================= 结果状态 =================
    32	
    33	    /// <summary>
    34	    /// 操作/检查是否成功（默认 true）
    35	    /// - 对于检查型事件：true 表示允许，false 表示阻止
    36	    /// - 对于操作型事件：true 表示成功，false 表示失败
    37	    /// </summary>
    38	    public bool Success { get; protected set; } = true;
    39	
    40	    /// <summary>
    41	    /// 失败/阻止原因
    42	    /// </summary>
    43	    public string? FailReason { get; protected set; }
    44	
    45	    /// <summary>
    46	    /// 标记为失败或阻止
    47	    /// </summary>
    48	    /// <param name="reason">原因</param>
    49	    public void SetFailed(string reason)
    50	    {
    51	        Success = false;
    52	        IsHandled = true;
    53	        // 记录第一个失败原因
    54	        FailReason ??= reason;
    55	    }
    56	
    57	    // ================= 通用结果返回 =================
    58	
    59	    /// <summary>
    60	    /// 通用结果存储（用于事件处理器返回强类型结果）
    61	    /// 使用示例：
    62	    /// <code>
    63	    /// var ctx = new EventContext();
    64	    /// Events.Emit(new GameEventType.Ability.TryTrigger(ctx));
    65	    /// var result = ctx.GetResult&lt;TriggerResult&gt;();
    66	    /// </code>
    67	    /// </summary>
    68	    private object? _result;
    69	
    70	    /// <summary>
    71	    /// 设置强类型结果
    72	    /// </summary>
    73	    public void SetResult<T>(T result)
    74	    {
    75	        _result = result;
    76	        IsHandled = true;
    77	    }
    78	
    79	    /// <summary>
    80	    /// 获取强类型结果
    81	    /// </summary>
    82	    public T? GetResult<T>()
    83	    {
    84	        return _result is T typedResult ? typedResult : default;
    85	    }
    86	
    87	    /// <summary>
    88	    /// 检查是否有结果
    89	    /// </summary>
    90	    public bool HasResult => _result != null;
    91	}

     1	/// <summary>
     2	/// 修改器类型枚举
     3	/// 完整公式：
     4	///   step1 = (base + Σ[Additive]) × Π[Multiplicative] + Σ[FinalAdditive]
     5	///   step2 = Override 存在时，取优先级最高（Priority 最小）的 Override 值
     6	///   step3 = Cap 存在时，result = min(result, min(all Cap values))
     7	///   step4 = Meta.Clamp 约束 [MinValue, MaxValue]
     8	/// </summary>
     9	public enum ModifierType
    10	{
    11	    /// <summary>
    12	    /// 加法修改器：叠加到基础值（在乘法前计算）
    13	    /// e.g. 基础攻击 100 + Additive(50) = 150，再乘以乘法系数
    14	    /// </summary>
    15	    Additive,
    16	
    17	    /// <summary>
    18	    /// 乘法修改器：系数相乘（在加法后计算）
    19	    /// e.g. Multiplicative(1.2) × Multiplicative(1.1) = ×1.32
    20	    /// </summary>
    21	    Multiplicative,
    22	
    23	    /// <summary>
    24	    /// 后置加法修改器：在乘法之后再加（最终值 = step1 + Σ[FinalAdditive]）
    25	    /// 适合"固定数值增益"不受乘法放大的场景，e.g. +20 物理穿透（不随攻击力系数放大）
    26	    /// </summary>
    27	    FinalAdditive,
    28	
    29	    /// <summary>
    30	    /// 覆盖修改器：无视其他所有修改器，强制设为此值
    31	    /// 多个 Override 时取 Priority 最小（优先级最高）的值
    32	    /// 适合"锁定属性"场景，e.g. 被冰冻时移速强制为 0
    33	    /// </summary>
    34	    Override,
    35	
    36	    /// <summary>
    37	    /// 上限修改器：限制最终结果不超过此值（多个 Cap 取最小值）
    38	    /// 在所有修改器计算完毕后、Meta.Clamp 之前生效
    39	    /// e.g. 暴击率上限 75%（取最严格的 Cap）
    40	    /// </summary>
    41	    Cap,
    42	}
    43	
    44	/// <summary>
    45	/// 数据修改器 - 用于 Buff/Debuff 系统
    46	/// 公式：最终值 = (基础值 + Σ加法) × Π乘法
    47	/// </summary>
    48	public class DataModifier
    49	{
    50	    /// <summary>
    51	    /// 修改器唯一标识符
    52	    /// </summary>
    53	    public string Id { get; init; }
    54	
    55	    /// <summary>
    56	    /// 修改器类型（加法/乘法）
    57	    /// </summary>
    58	    public ModifierType Type { get; init; }
    59	
    60	    /// <summary>
    61	    /// 修改值
    62	    /// 加法类型：直接加到基础值
    63	    /// 乘法类型：作为乘数（1.0 = 100%，1.5 = 150%）
    64	    /// </summary>

    66	
    67	    /// <summary>
    68	    /// 计算优先级（数值越小越先计算）

    71	
    72	    /// <summary>
    73	    /// 修改器来源对象（例如：装备 Entity、Buff 实例）

    77

     6	/// <summary>

     9	/// </summary>
    10	public sealed class ComponentRegistrar
    11	{
    12	    private static readonly Log _log = new(nameof(ComponentRegistrar), LogLevel.Debug);
    13	
    14	    private readonly EntityRegistry? _entityRegistry;

    18	
    19	    public ComponentRegistrar(EntityRegistry? entityRegistry = null)
    20	    {
    21	        _entityRegistry = entityRegistry;
    22	    }
    23	
    24	    /// <summary>
    25	    /// 递归扫描并注册指定 Entity 下的所有 Component。
    26	    /// </summary>
    27	    public int RegisterComponents(Node? entity)
    28	    {
    29	        if (entity == null)
    30	            return 0;
    31	
    32	        return RegisterComponents(entity, FindComponentNodes(entity));
    33	    }
    34	
    35	    /// <summary>
    36	    /// 使用外部已扫描的 Component 列表注册，供 EntityManager 复用预热缓存。
    37	    /// </summary>
    38	    public int RegisterComponents(Node? entity, IEnumerable<Node> components)
    39	    {
    40	        if (entity == null)
    41	            return 0;
    42	
    43	        var registeredCount = 0;
    44	        foreach (var component in components.Distinct().ToArray())
    45	        {
    46	            if (RegisterComponent(entity, component))
    47	                registeredCount++;
    48	        }
    49	
    50	        return registeredCount;
    51	    }
    52	
    53	    /// <summary>
    54	    /// 注册单个 Component，并建立内部 owner 反查索引。
    55	    /// </summary>
    56	    public bool RegisterComponent(Node? entity, Node? component)
    57	    {
    58	        if (entity == null || component == null || entity == component)
    59	            return false;
    60	
    61	        if (_entityRegistry != null && _entityRegistry.GetEntityId(entity).IsEmpty)
    62	        {
    63	            _log.Warn($"Entity 未注册到 EntityRegistry，跳过 Component 注册: {entity.Name}");
    64	            return false;
    65	        }
    66	
    67	        if (!IsComponentNode(component))
    68	            return false;
    69	
    70	        if (_entityByComponent.TryGetValue(component, out var existingOwner))
    71	        {
    72	            if (existingOwner != entity)
    73	                _log.Warn($"Component 已归属其他 Entity，跳过重复注册: {component.Name}");
    74	
    75	            return false;
    76	        }
    77	
    78	        NodeLifecycleManager.Register(component);
    79	
    80	        if (!_componentsByEntity.TryGetValue(entity, out var components))
    81	        {
    82	            components = new HashSet<Node>();
    83	            _componentsByEntity[entity] = components;
    84	        }
    85	
    86	        components.Add(component);
    87	        _entityByComponent[component] = entity;
    88	        AddTypeIndex(component);
    89	
    90	        if (component is IComponent iComponent)
    91	        {
    92	            try
    93	            {
    94	                iComponent.OnComponentRegistered(entity);
    95	            }
    96	            catch (Exception ex)
    97	            {

    99	            }
   100	        }
   101	
   102	        return true;
   103	    }
   104	
   105	    /// <summary>
   106	    /// 注销指定 Entity 的全部 Component，不销毁节点本身。

   109	    {
   110	        if (entity == null)
   111	            return 0;

   116	        foreach (var component in components)

   138	
   139	    /// <summary>

   146

     1	using System;
     2	using System.Collections.Generic;

     4	
     5	// 采用混合命名空间策略：核心工具类放在全局命名空间，方便调用
     6	
     7	/// <summary>
     8	/// 全局对象池管理器
     9	/// 提供静态访问接口，支持自动归还和全局池生命周期管理
    10	/// </summary>
    11	public static class ObjectPoolManager
    12	{
    13	    private static readonly Log _log = new(nameof(ObjectPoolManager));
    14	
    15	    // 全局池字典，按 PoolName 索引（存储任意类型的池）
    16	    private static readonly Dictionary<string, object> _pools = [];
    17	
    18	    // 非 Node 对象到池名称的映射（用于纯 C# 对象的静态归还）
    19	    private static readonly Dictionary<object, string> _objectToPoolMap = [];
    20	
    21	    // 线程锁对象
    22	    private static readonly object _lock = new();
    23	
    24	    /// <summary> 注册一个对象池到管理器（泛型版本） </summary>
    25	    public static void Register<T>(ObjectPool<T> pool) where T : class
    26	    {
    27	        lock (_lock)
    28	        {
    29	            if (_pools.ContainsKey(pool.PoolName))
    30	            {
    31	                _log.Warn($"池名称 '{pool.PoolName}' 已存在。将覆盖旧池。");
    32	            }
    33	            _pools[pool.PoolName] = pool;
    34	        }
    35	    }
    36	
    37	    /// <summary> 从管理器中注销一个对象池（泛型版本） </summary>
    38	    public static void Unregister<T>(ObjectPool<T> pool) where T : class
    39	    {
    40	        lock (_lock)
    41	        {
    42	            _pools.Remove(pool.PoolName);
    43	            // 注意：这里很难高效清理 _objectToPoolMap 中属于该池的对象，
    44	            // 但通常 Unregister 只在销毁时发生，此时 Map 也会被清理。
    45	        }
    46	
    47	        ObjectPoolObservability.UnregisterMetadata(pool.PoolName);
    48	    }
    49	
    50	    /// <summary>
    51	    /// 注册对象归属关系（供 ObjectPool 内部调用）
    52	    /// </summary>
    53	    public static void MapObject(object obj, string poolName)
    54	    {
    55	        // Node 对象使用 MetaData 存储，不需要字典映射
    56	        if (obj is Node) return;
    57	
    58	        lock (_lock)
    59	        {
    60	            _objectToPoolMap[obj] = poolName;
    61	        }
    62	    }
    63	
    64	    /// <summary>
    65	    /// 解除对象归属关系（供 ObjectPool 内部调用）
    66	    /// </summary>
    67	    public static void UnmapObject(object obj)
    68	    {
    69	        if (obj is Node) return;
    70	
    71	        lock (_lock)
    72	        {
    73	            _objectToPoolMap.Remove(obj);
    74	        }
    75	    }
    76	
    77	    /// <summary>
    78	    /// 静态归还方法（核心功能）
    79	    /// 自动查找对象所属的对象池并执行归还操作。
    80	    /// 支持 Node 对象（通过 MetaData）和纯 C# 对象（通过内部映射）。
    81	    /// </summary>
    82	    /// <param name="instance">要归还的对象</param>
    83	    public static void ReturnToPool(object instance)
    84	    {
    85	        if (instance == null) return;
    86	
    87	        string? poolName = null;
    88	
    89	        // 1. 尝试从 Node MetaData 获取
    90	        if (instance is Node node)
    91	        {
    92	            if (node.HasMeta("ObjectPoolName"))
    93	            {
    94	                poolName = node.GetMeta("ObjectPoolName").AsString();
    95	            }
    96	
    97	            if (poolName == null)
    98	            {
    99	                _log.Warn($"Node {node.Name} 未找到 ObjectPoolName MetaData。将退回到 QueueFree。");
   100	                node.QueueFree();
   101	                return;
   102	            }
   103	        }
   104	        // 2. 尝试从内部映射获取 (纯 C# 对象)
   105	        else
   106	        {
   107	            lock (_lock)
   108	            {
   109	                poolName = _objectToPoolMap.GetValueOrDefault(instance);
   110	            }
   111	
   112	            if (poolName == null)
   113	            {
   114	                _log.Error($"实例 {instance} 未注册到 ObjectPoolManager，无法自动归还。请确保它是通过 Spawn/Get 获取的。");
   115	                return;
   116	            }
   117	        }
   118	
   119	        // 3. 查找池并调用 Release
   120	        lock (_lock)
   121	        {
   122	            if (_pools.TryGetValue(poolName, out var poolObj))
   123	            {
   124	                var releaseMethod = poolObj.GetType().GetMethod("Release");
   125	                if (releaseMethod != null)
   126	                {
   127	                    releaseMethod.Invoke(poolObj, new[] { instance });
   128	                    return;
   129	                }
   130	            }
   131	        }
   132	
   133	        // 池不存在
   134	        if (instance is Node n)
   135	        {
   136	            _log.Warn($"池 '{poolName}' 不存在。Node {n.Name} 将退回到 QueueFree。");
   137	            n.QueueFree();
   138	        }
   139	        else
   140	        {
   141	            _log.Error($"池 '{poolName}' 不存在。对象 {instance} 无法归还。");
   142	        }
   143	    }
   144	
   145	    /// <summary> 根据名称获取对象池实例（泛型版本，提供类型安全） </summary>
   146	    public static ObjectPool<T>? GetPool<T>(string name) where T : class
   147	    {
   148	        lock (_lock)
   149	        {
   150	            if (_pools.TryGetValue(name, out var poolObj))
   151	            {
   152	                return poolObj as ObjectPool<T>;
   153	            }
   154	            return null;
   155	        }
   156	    }
   157	
   158	    /// <summary> 获取当前所有池的详细统计信息 </summary>
   159	    public static Dictionary<string, PoolStats> GetAllStats()
   160	    {
   161	        lock (_lock)
   162	        {
   163	            var stats = new Dictionary<string, PoolStats>();
   164	            foreach (var kvp in _pools)
   165	            {
   166	                var getStatsMethod = kvp.Value.GetType().GetMethod("GetStats");
   167	                if (getStatsMethod != null)
   168	                {
   169	                    var poolStats = getStatsMethod.Invoke(kvp.Value, null);
   170	                    if (poolStats is PoolStats ps)
   171	                    {
   172	                        stats[kvp.Key] = ps;
   173	                    }
   174	                }
   175	            }
   176	            return stats;
   177	        }
   178	    }
   179	
   180	    /// <summary> 清理所有池中的闲置对象，保留每个池指定的最小数量 </summary>
   181	    public static void CleanupAll(int retainCount)
   182	    {
   183	        lock (_lock)
   184	        {
   185	            foreach (var poolObj in _pools.Values)
   186	            {
   187	                var cleanupMethod = poolObj.GetType().GetMethod("Cleanup");
   188	                cleanupMethod?.Invoke(poolObj, new object[] { retainCount });
   189	            }
   190	        }
   191	    }
   192	
   193	    /// <summary>
   194	    /// 彻底销毁所有池
   195	    /// 在场景切换或游戏结束时调用，确保内存释放
   196	    /// </summary>
   197	    public static void DestroyAll()
   198	    {
   199	        lock (_lock)
   200	        {
   201	            foreach (var poolObj in _pools.Values)
   202	            {
   203	                var clearMethod = poolObj.GetType().GetMethod("Clear");
   204	                clearMethod?.Invoke(poolObj, null);
   205	            }
   206	            _pools.Clear();
   207	            _objectToPoolMap.Clear();
   208	        }
   209	
   210	        ObjectPoolObservability.Clear();
   211	        ObjectPoolRuntimeStateStore.Clear();
   212	        PoolParkingStrategy.Clear();
   213	        _log.Info("所有对象池已销毁并清空。");
   214	    }
   215	}

```

### 000176 function_call_output

- call_id: `call_wRR3IuFMQlHiqnrkqj1sQ6VL`

**Output**

````text
Chunk ID: a42430
Wall time: 0.0000 seconds
Process exited with code 0
Original token count: 3126
Output:
     1	# Data 运行时泛型存储设计
     2	
     3	## 当前结论
     4	
     5	Data 必须改，而且应按 hard cutover 改。当前 Data 已经在事实源层完成 DataOS descriptor、runtime snapshot、generated `DataKey<T>`，调用侧也已经是 `Data.Get/Set<T>(DataKey<T>)`，但运行时值存储仍回到 `object?`。这会让 typed handle 的 AI-first 收益在热路径被抵消。
     6	
     7	用户判断“Data 的 object 问题比较大”成立。Data 是 ECS 运行时状态容器，读写频率远高于大部分工具层 API，不能继续把 `object?` 当主链路。
     8	
     9	用户对上一版设计的批评也成立：不应再用一个带 `IntValue/FloatValue/BoolValue/...` 多字段的 `DataRuntimeValue` union 替代 `object?`。那只是把“一个 object 存任意类型”的问题换成“一个结构体携带所有可能类型的字段”，会引入冗余字段、额外分发、调试歧义和未来类型扩张成本。SlimeAI 既然已经有 `DataKey<T>` 和 `Data.Get/Set<T>`，主链路就应继续走泛型。
    10	
    11	用户已确认 `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot` 是当前最优方案。本设计以此作为最终裁决：`DataSlot<T>` 保存真实业务值，`IDataSlot` 只作为跨类型 slot 管理和 diagnostics 边界；不再把 `DataRuntimeValue` union、`object? Value` 或多字典拆分作为同级候选。
    12	
    13	## 当初为什么这么设计
    14	
    15	从现有 DocsAI 和 PRJ-0002 记录看，Data 先解决的是事实源漂移：
    16	
    17	```text
    18	DataOS descriptor -> runtime_snapshot.json -> DataDefinitionCatalog -> generated DataKey<T> -> Data.Get/Set
    19	```
    20	
    21	这一步的重点是删除旧 `DataMeta` / `DataRegistry` / 手写 key，避免 AI 不知道字段定义在哪里。`object?` 在当时承担了三类便利：
    22	
    23	- loader 可以把 JSON / SQLite / Godot 输入统一送进 `DataValueConverter`。
    24	- 一个 `DataSlot` 可以存所有类型，避免短期内重写 modifier / computed / changed event。
    25	- 人工调试和 TestSystem 可以用 `SetUntyped` / `GetAll` 快速检查数据。
    26	
    27	这些便利帮助 Data 完成第一轮 descriptor-first hard cutover，但它不是最终形态。当前 AI-first 目标已经从“字段定义统一”推进到“运行时契约也要 typed、热路径也要可验证”。
    28	
    29	## 源码证据
    30	
    31	| 文件 | 证据 | 风险 |
    32	| --- | --- | --- |
    33	| `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `DataChangeRecord(string StableKey, object? OldValue, object? NewValue)` | 每次变更事件都保留 object payload |
    34	| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `DataSlot.Value object?`、`GetEffectiveValue(): object?`、`SetValue(object?)` | 所有值类型字段写入/读取都会穿过 object |
    35	| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `ConvertNumericToDefinitionType` 返回 `(object)(float/int/double)` | modifier 计算后重新装箱 |
    36	| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `DataValueConverter.ConvertInt/Float/Bool/Vector2` 返回 `object` | 写入转换阶段丢失 typed 返回 |
    37	| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `ConvertForRead(object?, Type, DataValueType)` 和 `Activator.CreateInstance` | 读取阶段靠 runtime type 判断 |
    38	| `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` | `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>`、`IDataComputeResolver.Compute(): object?` | computed 输出仍是 object |
    39	| `Data.cs` | `SetUntyped(... object?)`、`GetAll(): Dictionary<string, object>` | 宽口 API 仍可被业务误用 |
    40	| `GameEventType_Data.cs` | `PropertyChanged(string Key, object? OldValue, object? NewValue)` | Data changed event 与 Event object 问题耦合 |
    41	
    42	## 设计目标
    43	
    44	1. Data runtime hot path 不再使用 `object?` 存储数值和常见值类型。
    45	2. `DataKey<T>` 到 runtime storage 的泛型信息不在 `TrySetUntyped` 处丢失。
    46	3. loader / debug / TestSystem 的 untyped 输入只能停留在边界，并明确注释“不推荐业务使用，有装箱/GC 风险”。
    47	4. computed resolver、modifier pipeline 和 changed event 同步 typed 化。
    48	5. 执行后必须能用 grep gate 证明 AI 框架主链路不调用 object API。
    49	
    50	## 最终架构
    51	
    52	### 1. 用 `DataSlot<T>` 替代 `DataSlot.Value object?`
    53	
    54	最终裁决不是新增通用 value union，而是让每个 slot 自己持有真实类型：
    55	
    56	目标形状：
    57	
    58	```csharp
    59	internal interface IDataSlot
    60	{
    61	    DataDefinition Definition { get; }
    62	    Type ValueClrType { get; }
    63	    bool HasValue { get; }
    64	    DataDiagnosticValue ToDiagnosticValue();
    65	}
    66	
    67	internal class DataSlot<T> : IDataSlot
    68	{
    69	    private readonly DataValuePolicy<T> _policy;
    70	    private T _value;
    71	    private bool _hasValue;
    72	
    73	    public virtual T GetEffectiveValue();
    74	    public virtual bool SetValue(T value);
    75	    public bool TrySetFromBoundary(object? rawValue, DataWriteSource source, out DataWriteReport report);
    76	}
    77	```
    78	
    79	裁决边界：
    80	
    81	- `DataRuntimeStorage` 可以继续用 `Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>` 管不同类型的 slot；这是类型擦除的管理边界，不存业务值。
    82	- 热路径 `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` 取到 `DataSlot<T>` 后直接写 `T`，不经过 `object?`。
    83	- 热路径 `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` 取到 `DataSlot<T>` 后直接读 `T`，不经过 `ConvertForRead(object?)`。
    84	- `IDataSlot` 只暴露 metadata、diagnostic snapshot 和边界方法，不能提供 `object? Value`。
    85	- 实现 SDD 不再比较 `DataRuntimeValue`、多字典存储和 `DataSlot<T>` 作为平级方案；只能在 `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot` 内部细化 policy、resolver、change event 和 diagnostics。
    86	
    87	### 2. Catalog 建 typed runtime definition
    88	
    89	`DataDefinition.DefaultValue object?` 可以作为 snapshot/DTO 层的历史输入，但进入 runtime catalog 后必须投影为 typed definition：
    90	
    91	```csharp
    92	internal interface IDataFieldDefinition
    93	{
    94	    string StableKey { get; }
    95	    Type ValueClrType { get; }
    96	    DataValueType ValueType { get; }
    97	    IDataSlot CreateSlot();
    98	}
    99	
   100	internal sealed class DataFieldDefinition<T> : IDataFieldDefinition
   101	{
   102	    public DataKey<T> Key { get; }
   103	    public T DefaultValue { get; }
   104	    public DataValuePolicy<T> Policy { get; }
   105	
   106	    public IDataSlot CreateSlot() => new DataSlot<T>(this);
   107	}
   108	```
   109	
   110	`DataDefinitionCatalog.GetField<T>(DataKey<T>)` 必须校验 generated handle 的 `T` 与 descriptor `valueType/runtimeTypeId` 一致。不一致时 fail fast，而不是读写阶段再 `Convert.ChangeType`。
   111	
   112	### 3. Converter 分层：泛型热路径 + 边界 untyped
   113	
   114	上一版设计提出 `TryConvert<T>(..., out DataRuntimeValue)`，问题在于最终又回到统一 value 容器。新方案应直接转换到 `T`：
   115	
   116	```csharp
   117	public sealed class DataValuePolicy<T>
   118	{
   119	    public bool TryConvertTyped(T value, DataWriteSource source, out T finalValue, out DataWriteReport report);
   120	    public bool TryConvertBoundary(object? rawValue, DataWriteSource source, out T finalValue, out DataWriteReport report);
   160	        return _numericPolicy.ApplyModifiers(baseValue, _modifiers, Definition);
   161	    }
   162	}
   163	```
   164	
   165	实现时可以用 `FloatDataValuePolicy`、`IntDataValuePolicy`、`DoubleDataValuePolicy` 三个显式策略，先不强依赖 C# generic math。重点是 slot 存的是 `T`，modifier 计算返回的也是 `T`。
   166	
   167	### 5. Computed resolver 类型化
   168	
   169	当前 `IDataComputeResolver.Compute()` 返回 `object?`。目标改为泛型 resolver：
   170	
   171	```csharp
   172	public interface IDataComputeResolver<T>
   173	{
   174	    string ComputeId { get; }
   175	    T Compute(Data data, DataFieldDefinition<T> definition);
   176	}
   177	
   178	public abstract class FloatComputeResolver : IDataComputeResolver<float>
   179	{
   180	    public abstract string ComputeId { get; }
   181	    public abstract float Compute(Data data, DataFieldDefinition<float> definition);
   182	}
   183	```
   184	
   185	`DataComputeRegistry` 可以用非泛型 metadata 管注册表，但执行时必须按 field 的 `T` 获取 `IDataComputeResolver<T>`。类型不匹配是 catalog build error，不是运行时转换。
   186	
   187	computed cache 不再是 `Dictionary<string, object?>`。computed 字段本身就是 `ComputedDataSlot<T>`，slot 内缓存 `T _cachedValue` 和 dirty flag。
   188	
   189	### 6. Data changed event 泛型化
   190	
   191	`PropertyChanged(string, object?, object?)` 不应继续是运行时通用事件。推荐由 typed slot 负责发 typed change：
   192	
   193	```csharp
   194	public readonly record struct DataChanged<T>(DataKey<T> Key, T OldValue, T NewValue);
   195	
   196	internal interface IDataChangeDispatcher
   197	{
   198	    void Emit<T>(DataKey<T> key, T oldValue, T newValue);
   199	}
   200	```
   201	
   202	对外分层：
   203	
   204	- 高频业务监听：Capability 自己定义领域事件，例如 `HealthChanged(float oldHp, float newHp)`，或订阅 `DataChanged<float>`。
   205	- Runtime 内部：slot 调 `IDataChangeDispatcher.Emit<T>`，不把 old/new 先装成 object。
   206	- Debug/TestSystem：单独生成 `DataDiagnosticChange`，可包含字符串、stable key、类型名和格式化值。
   207	
   208	### 7. `DataRuntimeValue` 裁决
   209	
   210	不推荐引入上一版 `DataRuntimeValue` 多字段 union，原因：
   211	
   212	- 它复制了 descriptor 已经知道的类型分发信息。
   213	- 它让每个值都携带所有候选类型字段，结构冗余明显。
   214	- 新增 `EntityId`、`ResourceRef`、`EntityIdList`、自定义 runtime ref 时会继续膨胀。
   215	- 它不能像 `DataSlot<T>` 一样让编译器直接检查 `DataKey<T>` 与 storage 的一致性。
   216	- 它仍鼓励写“通用 runtime value 处理器”，AI 容易继续绕过 `Data.Get/Set<T>`。
   217	
   218	只有一种例外：如果未来 profiler 证明 `Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>` 的虚调用/类型检查成为瓶颈，可以在非常热的固定字段集合上做 source-generated typed storage。但那应是 benchmark 驱动的 P2 优化，不是本轮 object 去除的默认架构。
   219	
   220	## API 裁决
   221	
   222	| API | 裁决 |
   223	| --- | --- |
   224	| `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` | 保留，主入口 |
   225	| `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` | 保留，主入口 |
   226	| `Data.Get<T>(string)` | 降为 internal 或删除；AI 框架不应业务调用 |
   227	| `Data.Set<T>(string, T)` | 降为 internal 或删除 |
   228	| `Data.SetUntyped(... object?)` | 仅 loader/debug internal；注释明确装箱/GC 风险 |
   229	| `Data.GetAll(): Dictionary<string, object>` | 改为 diagnostic snapshot API，不作为业务工具 |
   230	| `DataModifier.Source object?` | 改为 typed source id，优先 `EntityId?` / `FeatureInstanceId` / `string sourceId` |
   231	
   232	## 迁移步骤
   233	
   234	1. 建 `DataFieldDefinition<T>`、`DataSlot<T>`、`DataValuePolicy<T>`，先覆盖 `int/float/double/bool/string/string[]/ResourceRef/EntityId?`。
   235	2. 让 catalog build 阶段把 descriptor 投影为 typed runtime field，generated `DataKey<T>` 与 field `T` 不一致时报错。
   236	3. 改 `Data.Get/Set<T>(DataKey<T>)` 直接走 `DataSlot<T>`，不再进入 `SetUntyped(... object?)`。
   237	4. 改 modifier 为数值 slot/policy，移除 `object? -> double -> object?` 路径。
   238	5. 改 computed resolver 为 `IDataComputeResolver<T>`，computed cache 进入 `ComputedDataSlot<T>`。
   239	6. 改 `DataChangeRecord` 和 `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged` 为 typed change 或 domain event + diagnostic snapshot。
   240	7. 改 snapshot loader 和 debug/test untyped API 到边界 converter，保留注释和 grep gate。
   241	8. 迁移业务调用点，清理 `Get<T>(string)`、`SetUntyped(string, object?)`、`GetAll()` 非测试调用。
   242	9. 更新 DocsAI Runtime/Data 和 `ecs-data` skill。
   243	
   244	## 验证门禁
   245	

````

Output:
     1	# Data Runtime Generic Slot Hard Cutover
     2	
     3	## Goal
     4	
     5	把 Runtime Data 主链路从 `object?` 值槽切到泛型槽位，降低 typed `DataKey<T>` 读写、modifier、computed cache 的装箱拆箱和动态转换风险。
     6	
     7	本轮目标：
     8	
     9	- `Data.Set<T>(DataKey<T>, T)` / `Data.Get<T>(DataKey<T>)` 对非 computed 字段直接命中 `DataSlot<T>`。
    10	- 数值 modifier 的基础值、有效值和 slot cache 以 `T` 保存，不再通过 `object? -> double -> object?` 作为存储主链路。
    11	- computed 仍兼容现有 resolver 注册表，但 runtime cache 进入 typed `DataSlot<T>`；resolver 返回值只在边界转换一次。
    12	- `SetUntyped`、snapshot loader、debug/TestSystem dump 暂留 Data 边界，并明确标注装箱/GC 风险。
    13	- 只修改 Data owner 范围；Event、Feature、Ability、ObjectPool、TargetSelector、Logger 不在本 SDD 改。
    14	
    15	## Context
    16	
    17	### Context Read
    18	
    19	- Git Boundary: `/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI`
    20	- Worktree: none。用户要求在当前仓按 Data 方案继续执行；创建临时 worktree 会增加 SDD/AI config 同步噪音，本轮在干净工作区直接改。
    21	- Baseline Status: SDD 创建前 `git status --short` clean；创建并启动后只有 SDD index/catalog 和新 SDD 目录改动。
    22	- Submodule Boundary: 不涉及游戏仓和 submodule。
    23	- Workflow: `NewFeature` / large SDD refactor。
    24	- Owner skills: `ecs-data`、`data-authoring`；实现只触及 Data runtime，不改 DataOS schema / seed 时不运行生成器。
    25	- 已读事实源：
    26	  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Routes/NewFeature.md`
    27	  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md`
    28	  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DesignCritic.md`
    29	  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/Planner.md`
    30	  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/TestDesigner.md`
    31	  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Rules/ReviewGates.md`
    32	  - `Workspace/SystemAgent/Rules/Documentation.md`
    33	  - `Workspace/SDD/docs/SDDFormat.md`
    34	  - `Workspace/SDD/docs/CLI.md`
    35	  - `Workspace/SDD/docs/ValidationRules.md`
    36	  - `DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/Data/Data系统说明.md`
    37	  - `design/00-总览与AI-first裁决.md`
    38	  - `design/01-Data运行时object去除设计.md`
    39	  - `design/01-DataSlot结构化装箱.md`
    40	  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/*.cs`
    41	  - `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/*.cs`
    42	
    43	### Problem Shape
    44	
    45	当前 Data 已完成 descriptor-first / snapshot-first / generated `DataKey<T>`，但 storage 仍在热路径丢失泛型信息：
    46	
    47	- `DataRuntimeStorage.TrySet<T>` 调 `TrySetUntyped(key.StableKey, value, ...)`，值类型写入会进入 `object?` 参数。
    48	- `DataSlot.Value object?` 保存所有运行时基础值。
    49	- `DataSlot.GetEffectiveValue(): object?` 和 `DataValueConverter.ConvertForRead(object?)` 让读取继续走动态转换。
    50	- `DataSlot.ApplyModifiers(object?)` 把数值拆成 `double` 后再按 descriptor 装回 `object`。
    51	- `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>` 保存 computed 输出。
    52	- `DataChangeRecord` 和 `GameEventType.Data.PropertyChanged` 仍承载 `object?` old/new，但这是 Event/diagnostic 边界，本轮不强行改 Event 协议。
    53	
    54	### Main Risks
    55	
    56	- **范围膨胀**：如果本轮同时删除 `PropertyChanged(object?)` 或改 Feature/Ability context，会跨到 Event/Capability SDD。处理方式：只在 Data runtime 内部 typed 化，公共事件协议暂留。
    57	- **loader 兼容边界**：snapshot loader 当前只能传 untyped 值。处理方式：保留 `SetUntyped`，但让它只作为边界 API，内部转换后写 typed slot。
    58	- **computed resolver 迁移成本**：一次性把所有 resolver 改成 `IDataComputeResolver<T>` 会牵动 Feature test 和 registry。处理方式：本轮先让 computed slot/cache typed 化，resolver 返回 object 只作为 registry 边界；完整 `IDataComputeResolver<T>` 可以后续独立收口。
    59	- **测试证据不足**：DataOS Godot scene 只能证明行为，不直接证明无装箱。处理方式：新增 runtime contract 测试检查 slot 形态和 typed API 不走 untyped counter，再用 grep gate 检查主链路。
    60	
    61	## Design
    62	
    63	### Options
    64	
    65	1. **推荐：渐进 hard cutover 到 `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot`**
    66	   - 优点：符合项目级裁决；保留 dictionary 管理边界；行为风险可由现有 DataRuntimeTestScene 覆盖。
    67	   - 代价：需要在 `DataRuntimeStorage.cs` 内拆出 typed slot、typed converter/policy 和 computed typed helper。
    68	
    69	2. **一次性完全改 `IDataComputeResolver<T>`、typed `DataChanged<T>` 和 public untyped 删除**
    70	   - 优点：更接近项目级最终形态。
    71	   - 代价：会跨 Event/Feature/Ability/TestSystem 调用点，违背“先改 data，其他不动”。
    72	
    73	3. **只加注释和 grep gate，不重构 storage**
    74	   - 优点：低风险。
    75	   - 代价：不能解决 `DataSlot.Value object?` 和 `Data.Get/Set<T>` 热路径问题。
    76	
    77	### Recommendation
    78	
    79	采用方案 1。本 SDD 做 Data 内部硬切：`DataSlot<T>` 存储业务值，`IDataSlot` 只暴露 metadata、modifier 操作、diagnostic dump 和边界写入；`Dictionary<string, IDataSlot>` 作为跨类型管理边界可保留。公共 Event payload、Feature/Ability context 和 TestSystem UI 展示留给后续 SDD。
    80	
    81	### Target Shape
    82	
    83	- `IDataSlot`
    84	  - 暴露 `DataDefinition Definition`、`Type ValueClrType`、`bool HasValue`。
    85	  - 提供 `GetEffectiveValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()` 和 `GetStoredValueAsObjectForDiagnostics()`，只供事件/diagnostic/dump 边界使用。
   130	
   131	- expectedInputs: Data descriptor definitions for float/int/double/bool/string/string_array/object_ref/modifier_list/computed; typed `DataKey<T>` set/get; loader `SetUntyped`; modifier changes; computed dependency dirty.
   132	- expectedObservations: typed set/get creates `DataSlot<T>` or numeric typed slot; typed path does not increment untyped boundary counter; modifier and computed effective values match previous behavior; loader/debug untyped still converts and reports structured errors.
   133	- passCriteria: DataRuntimeTestScene covers typed slot contract, modifier pipeline, computed cache, diagnostics and existing DataOS behavior; grep gate shows `DataSlot.Value object?` and `_computedCache Dictionary<string, object?>` removed from Data runtime.
   134	- failCriteria: typed `DataKey<T>` write still calls `TrySetUntyped`; slot exposes business `object? Value`; modifier/computed behavior regresses; DataOS validator or build fails.
   135	- artifactPath: `Src/ECS/Runtime/Data/Tests/DataOS/DataRuntimeTestScene.cs` plus command outputs recorded in `progress.md`.
   136

   138	
   139	```bash
